name: zindex_archive_close_and_free_records
description: zIndexArchive::CloseAndFreeRecords flushes dirty records, closes an open handle, frees records, resets fields, and returns one.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?CloseAndFreeRecords@zIndexArchive@@QAEHXZ at 0x4a62b0 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 12 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 51 bytes and the VC object symbol is 64 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
The native smokes exercise both clean archive unload and dirty close with trailer validation and field reset.
